tasks.subject: M4 Task 0: EncodeResult + ImageEncoder + ImageIOEncoder

tasks.subject: M4 Task 3: ImageProcessor
tasks.description:
decode → resize → color-convert → encode selected formats → [EncodeResult].

```json:metadata
{"files": ["Sources/WebPicCore/Encoding/ImageProcessor.swift", "Tests/WebPicCoreTests/ImageProcessorTests.swift"], "verifyCommand": "swift test --filter ImageProcessorTests", "acceptanceCriteria": ["load full-res", "resize+encode dims/formats", "smaller than source", "priority order"]}
```

tasks.subject: M4 Task 4: TargetSizeSolver + target-mode
tasks.description:
Binary search quality to byte budget; processForTarget encodes all formats at solved quality.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["Sources/WebPicCore/Encoding/TargetSizeSolver.swift", "Sources/WebPicCore/Encoding/ImageProcessor.swift", "Tests/WebPicCoreTests/TargetSizeSolverTests.swift"], "verifyCommand": "swift test --filter TargetSizeSolverTests", "acceptanceCriteria": ["converges under target 5..100", "processForTarget + chosenQuality"]}
```
